plan.description: Snapshot-only example: FX matrix supplied via initial_market.fx, with no calibration steps. Demonstrates Track B — non-bootstrapped market data (FX cross rates) carried directly through initial_market. Three direct quotes (EUR/USD, USD/JPY, GBP/USD) are supplied; EUR/JPY is not quoted directly but is available via triangulation through the USD pivot. Shows both direct lookup and triangulated cross-rate retrieval.
